content.title: Mastering Agentic Coding & GPUs

speaker.name: Anton Alexander
speaker.title: Sr. GenAI Specialist
speaker.bio: Focusing on scaling large training and inference workloads with AWS and NVIDIA technologies.

content.overview: This 2-hour workshop covers building, deploying, and scaling production-ready agentic systems. Learn to structure agentic coding workflows and effectively use GPUs and Kubernetes.
whoShouldAttend: Organizations looking to implement custom AI solutions
whoShouldNotAttend: Complete beginners with no coding experience
Those looking for a non-technical overview
Anyone expecting pre-built solutions without hands-on work
